characters.name: Characters
characters.description: Adversaries are recurring characters the team encounters periodically or pursues over a story arc. Some may work with the team at times. Note: Chaos and Quinn were hired by the team inThe Last Dam Job

characters.name: Wes Abernathy
characters.description: Dr. Wes Abernathy (a.k.a. Eliot Spencer) attempts to "save the life" of MinisterRobert Bioko(a.k.a Alec Hardison) Dr. Wes Abernathyis an alias, often used byEliot Spencerin the television seriesLeverage. Unlike some of Eliot's other aliases, Dr. Wes Abernathy is a real person. It was an identity stolen back in 2005 during "The Rashomon Job". Eliot stole the identity from Dr. Abernathy trying to get into the Boston Museum of Art & Antiquities.

characters.name: ALAY-NA
characters.description: ALAY-NAis an artificial intelligence program written byJoseph Cheng. ALAY-Na would runs his Searchlight facial recognition software and is Cheng's smarthouse. She was voiced by Chelsea Bryan and appeared in "The Double-Edged Sword Job".

characters.name: Tom Baker
characters.description: Nate Ford in the guise of Tom Baker withSophie Devereauxin the guise of his wife, Sarah Jane Baker Tom Bakeris a frequent alias ofNathan Ford.. While Nate was not originally issued a cover fromLeverage Consulting & Associates, he has used the Tom Baker ID on more than one occasion.

characters.name: Billy the Gent
characters.description: Billy the GentAffiliationThief, Getaway driverFamilyMiranda (daughter)AlliesSophieFirst AppearanceThe Pyramid JobLatest AppearanceThe Museum Makeover JobPlayed byMax Baker Billy the Gent is an old friend of Sophie’s, having worked as a part ofRamsey’s crew alongside her andArthur. Billy acted as the getaway driver when Ramsey’s crews’ art forgeries were discovered. Billy went to prison alongside Arthur but never blamed Sophie for it.[1]

characters.name: Katherine Clive
characters.description: Sophie as a deceased Katherine Clive inThe Two Live Crew Job. Katherine Cliveis an alias used by the characterSophie Devereauxin the television seriesLeverage. Both before and during Sophie's time withLeverage Consulting & Associates, Sophie has used the name Katherine Clive in a variety of her cons. It is probably the one she identifies with the most, aside from her Sophie Devereaux alias.

characters.name: Tobey Earnshaw
characters.description: Tobey EarnshawKnown AliasesMs. EarnshawAffiliationEarnshaw PharmaceuticalFamilyUnnamed fatherAlliesWilliam QuintAdversariesNathan Ford,Leverage Consulting & AssociatesFirst AppearanceThe Juror Number Six JobPlayed byLauren Holly  Tobey Earnshawis a drug heiress whose unnamed father founded Earnshaw Pharmaceutical, of which he remains CEO to this day. Tobey Earnshaw is a ruthless businesswoman with only one goal in mind: buying Quint's company for herself and ensuring her drug empire. She cares little for others and is hellbent on getting the company even at the cost of ruining the lives of innocent people. She does not care for Quint or her team, simply regarding them as a means to an end.

characters.name: Executive Assistant to Mr Rushing
characters.description: Executive AssistantAffiliationWakefield Agricultural CorporationFirst AppearanceThe Inside JobLatest AppearanceThe Ten Li'l Grifters JobPlayed byKelsey Rider  Sophie and Hardison used the aliases "Emily Peel" and "Jonathan Steed", clear references to Emma Peel and John Steed who were detectives in an old TV show called "The Avengers". The executive assistant recognized this fact (as evidenced by her reaction) but didn't share it with her boss.

characters.name: General Flores
characters.description: General Lawrence Flores,former General in theSan Lorenzomilitary, is now a parliamentary representative and trusted advisor toMichael Vittori, the current president of San Lorenzo. DuringThe San Lorenzo Job, Flores was the leading presidental candidate running against the corrupt incumbent presidentEdwin Ribera. He was in hiding because Ribera arrests his political opposition when Eliot contacted him to gain some intel on San Lorenzo. However, Eliot's call leadsDamien Moreau, who is bankrolling Ribera, to Flores and got him and his people thrown in jail. Flores refers to Eliot as commander, implying they served together in the military. Eliot saved Flores' life 1.5 times (the .5 because Eliot was the one sent to kill him).EliotandParkerrescue Flores and his people from the tombs, an underground prison beneath Parliament and Flores becomes part of the new Vittori administration upon release.
